agent_queries: Identify the safest rollback or manual handoff after a blocked action request.
Summarize why an action class is blocked from automation.
List exact confirmation checkpoints for a proposed attended workflow.
Return offline validation commands for the compatibility matrix.
stale_evidence_behavior: Treat rollback fixture observations as non-authoritative when public source evidence is stale.
Prefer asking for missing current facts over inferring current DevHub behavior.
Preserve blocked status when evidence is missing, stale, or conflicting.
missing_information_prompts: Ask which action the user wants to perform before classifying the action gate.
Ask whether the user is requesting read-only review, reversible draft work, or an official action.
Ask for explicit action-specific confirmation before attended consequential steps.
reversible_draft_boundaries: May roll back an unsubmitted draft plan in fixture state.
May abandon a proposed field mapping before any official record change.
Must escalate to manual handoff when rollback would require authenticated official state changes.
Must record only commit-safe journal summaries.
local_pdf_preview_boundaries: May validate fixture-backed field labels and preview metadata offline.
May refuse preview when required facts are missing or evidence is stale.
Must not upload, certify, submit, or attach PDF output to an official record.
Must not read or summarize private user documents in compatibility tests.
exact_confirmation_checkpoints: Before transitioning from read-only review to reversible draft work.
Before opening an authenticated attended surface.
Before saving fixture-derived guidance into any user-owned authenticated draft.
Before final actions involving official records, fees, inspections, uploads, or certifications.
manual_handoff_surfaces: Authenticated DevHub surfaces requiring user-owned account state.
Official correction upload and attachment workflows.
Trade permit purchase and fee payment workflows.
Inspection scheduling, cancellation, withdrawal, extension, or reactivation workflows.
Any surface presenting legal acknowledgement, certification, or attestation language.
